summary: Phase 1.6 shop progress tracker: session-scoped mock listing count toward 10-listing Standard status, copilot home ListingProgressWidget with four workflow states, MilestoneProgress listing bar, readiness_score_bucket on export_completed analytics. No TikTok API; published_stub is mock-only.

interfaceChanges.description: Increment active listing count and set published_stub widget state on export.
React hook for persona-scoped shop progress with session persistence.
Copilot home task-card widget showing listing journey state and SKU count.
Adds readiness_score and readiness_score_bucket to export_completed payload.

mappings.criterion: Successful export increments mock active listing count on seller persona profile
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_listing_workflow_ui.test.tsx::increments mock active listing count after successful export

mappings.criterion: MilestoneProgress progress bar updates after execute 3 to 4 listings
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_listing_workflow_ui.test.tsx::updates listing milestone progress bar after export

mappings.criterion: Task card widget renders correct state enum based on workflow progress
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_listing_workflow_ui.test.tsx::widget state transitions NoDistributor → DistributorKnown → DraftGenerated → Published-stub

mappings.criterion: Widget states NoDistributor DistributorKnown DraftGenerated Published-stub
Integration test complete export listing count increases by 1
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_shop_progress.test.ts::increments active listing count on export completion

mappings.criterion: Integration test widget state transitions through happy path
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_listing_workflow_ui.test.tsx::widget state transitions NoDistributor → DistributorKnown → DraftGenerated → Published-stub

mappings.criterion: Metrics hooks export rate and readiness score bucket via UX instrumentation
does not call backend APIs during workflow mock only
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_listing_workflow_ui.test.tsx::does not call backend APIs during workflow
